title: espeletia parvula
intro: Espeletia parvula, also known as the Small Espuelita or Small Espetilla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Espeletia parvula include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Espeletia parvula is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, although its uses and availability may vary depending on the region.
